title: [F] Title: "Feature Request: Enable sorting on protected worksheets with locked cells" Labels: enhancement, feature-request
author: sjadiscohen
body:
## Feature Request
Currently, when using worksheet protection with `sort: true` and `autoFilter: true`, Excel still prevents sorting despite these permissions being set. This appears to be due to how Excel handles programmatically-set protection vs manually-set protection.

## Requested Enhancement
Implement a way to generate Excel files where users can sort/filter data while keeping specific cells locked, similar to what's possible when setting protection manually in Excel.
